item.title: Blog002
item.description:
• TLDR
  • What is a homelab, ?

to do

  • Modify pub date above
  • add relevant tags
  • Outline

Exploring a Homelab

Intro

[! info] TL;DR A homelab is an area where you can experiment with technical concepts. Can take many forms from a virtualized server to a full rack of hardware. For me, my homelab is a humble 11 year-old macbook air that has been collecting dust. My goal was equally minimal: 1 - get an install of a sever up and running, 2 - perform an SSH in from a different device on the same network, 3 - PostgreSQL RDBMS setup and query via an SSH session.
